message.content: {"headline":"Performance and docs dominate the thread","summary":"The strongest evidence clusters around performance friction and onboarding documentation gaps.","priority":"high","confidence":0.84,"why_now":"The thread concentrates its highest-signal feedback in performance and onboarding friction.","cited_theme_keys":["performance","documentation"],"cited_comment_ids":["reddit:c3","reddit:c1"],"next_steps":["Profile search latency on large threads","Expand onboarding quickstart coverage"],"recommended_owner":"engineering","action_type":"fix","expected_outcome":"Reduce the main adoption blockers described in the thread."}
